name: New Oriental Education & Technology Group Inc.
description: New Oriental Education & Technology Group Inc. is a leading provider of private educational services in China. The company offers a comprehensive range of educational programs, services, and products, including test preparation, non-academic tutoring, intelligent learning systems and devices, study tours, and educational materials. Founded in 1993, New Oriental has built a strong brand and a nationwide network of schools, learning centers, and bookstores, helping students of all ages achieve their academic and personal goals.
